resources.string: Not connected due to low quality network
Automatically connected via network rating provider
Not connected to file transfer server
Connected to device for Internet access
Sharing local Internet connection with device
Pairing grants access to your contacts and call history when connected.
"Couldn't pair with %1$s because of an incorrect PIN or passkey."
Speed at which the text is spoken
Affects the tone of the synthesized speech
Sets the language-specific voice for the spoken text
Play a short demonstration of speech synthesis
Install the voice data required for speech synthesis

This speech synthesis engine may be able to collect all the text that will be spoken, including personal data like passwords and credit card numbers. It comes from the %s engine. Enable the use of this speech synthesis engine?
This language requires a working network connection for text-to-speech output.
This is an example of speech synthesis
Reset the pitch at which the text is spoken to default.
Developer options are not available for this user
VPN settings are not available for this user
Tethering settings are not available for this user
Access Point Name settings are not available for this user
Debug mode when USB is connected
Show a button in the power menu for taking a bug report
Screen will never sleep while charging
Capture all bluetooth HCI packets in a file
Allow the bootloader to be unlocked
WARNING: Device protection features will not work on this device while this setting is turned on.
"Select Bluetooth Audio Codec: Bits Per Sample"
Bluetooth Audio LDAC Codec: Playback Quality
"Select Bluetooth Audio LDAC Codec: Playback Quality"
Show options for wireless display certification
Increase Wi‑Fi logging level, show per SSID RSSI in Wi‑Fi Picker
When enabled, Wi‑Fi will be more aggressive in handing over the data connection to mobile, when Wi‑Fi signal is low
Allow/Disallow Wi‑Fi Roam Scans based on the amount of data traffic present at the interface
Select Logger sizes per log buffer
When we no longer are monitoring with the persistent logger, we are required to erase the logger data resident on your device.
Store logger data persistently on device
Select log buffers to store persistently on device
Always keep mobile data active, even when Wi‑Fi is active (for fast network switching).
Use tethering hardware acceleration if available
USB debugging is intended for development purposes only. Use it to copy data between your computer and your device, install apps on your device without notification, and read log data.
Revoke access to USB debugging from all computers you’ve previously authorized?
These settings are intended for development use only. They can cause your device and the applications on it to break or misbehave.
Check apps installed via ADB/ADT for harmful behavior.
Bluetooth devices without names (MAC addresses only) will be displayed
Disables the Bluetooth absolute volume feature in case of volume issues with remote devices such as unacceptably loud volume or lack of control.
Allow ringtones on the phone to be played on Bluetooth headsets
Enable terminal app that offers local shell access
Debugged application waits for debugger to attach before executing
TelephonyMonitor will collect logs when it detects a problem with telephony/modem functionality and prompt notification to user to file a bug
Flash screen when apps do long operations on main thread
Screen overlay showing current touch data
Flash entire window surfaces when they update
Flash views inside windows when drawn with the GPU
Flash hardware layers green when they update
Always use GPU for screen compositing
Disable automatic routing to USB audio peripherals
Force screen layout direction to RTL for all locales
Force use of GPU for 2d drawing
Enable 4x MSAA in OpenGL ES 2.0 apps
Destroy every activity as soon as the user leaves it
Show App Not Responding dialog for background apps
Displays on-screen warning when an app posts a notification without a valid channel
Makes any app eligible to be written to external storage, regardless of manifest values
Make all activities resizable for multi-window, regardless of manifest values.
Enable support for experimental freeform windows.
Desktop full backups aren’t currently protected
Tap to change or remove the password for desktop full backups
New password and confirmation don’t match
View and control currently running services
This choice is no longer valid. Try again.
"Convert data partition to file based encryption. !!Warning!! This will erase all your data. This feature is alpha, and may not work correctly. Press 'Wipe and convert…' to continue."
This feature is experimental and may affect performance.
About ^1 left based on your usage
^1 - about ^2 left based on your usage
Enter password to perform factory reset in demo mode
This input method may be able to collect all the text you type, including personal data like passwords and credit card numbers. It comes from the app %1$s. Use this input method?
"Note: After a reboot, this app can't start until you unlock your phone"
Delete all personal data from the watch?
Restart the device to apply changes.
"${nickname}'s watch was powered off via advanced settings. If you think the advanced settings password was compromised, please change it in Settings > Password protected advanced settings."
An app wants to turn on Bluetooth
An app wants to turn off Bluetooth
Allow the other device to pair with this device?
For more details, open HUAWEI FamCare and go to Settings > Privacy.
Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
Low battery. Charge the watch to at least %d%% before resetting.
"Watch hasn't been linked. The default PIN is %s."
Open HUAWEI FamCare and go to Settings > Password protected advanced settings to view the PIN.
"${nickname}'s watch's mobile data has been disabled."

"${nickname}'s watch's mobile data has been disabled. The watch will be disconnected, and functions such as positioning, fence, and chat cannot be used. You can go to the watch Settings>Advanced Settings>Wireless and Network Enable data services on the Mobile Data page."
Lock screen PIN has been enabled.
Lock screen PIN has been disabled.
The watch will no longer be able to automatically connect to this network and the password will be required next time. Remove anyway?
Intelligently switch between WLAN and mobile data.
For help, ask a parent to open HUAWEI FamCare and go to Features > App management to disable the PIN.
"Disabling the PIN will allow anyone to view data on the watch, compromising the user's privacy. Disable anyway?"

"This app includes data such as chats, images, videos, audio, and more, taking up %s of storage. Deleting this will affect your ability to search chat history, but won't affect your relationships in the app."
"This app has %s of data. Deleting this will clear your messages."
"${nickname}'s watch's storage is insufficient. Please clean it up."
Insufficient storage. Clean up your data.
When enabled, the battery will last longer, but Chat, Xiaodu, Kuwo, and Alipay will be unavailable.
The watch will vibrate. Drain the water?
Shake the watch to get water out of the speaker.
When closed, Dial Market will no longer be displayed in the Dial app. Are you sure you want to close?
This app has been uninstalled and needs to be reinstalled if you want to use it. Install?
"Unable to connect to server. Unable to set."
Verifying the authenticity of the network access license mark

"This service requires an Internet connection to read and transmit the IMEI and network access license digital code to the server of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology of the People's Republic of China to provide a true query function for the network access license mark. Clicking Agree means that you agree to the above content."
"The watch is offline Tap the screen to try again"
Tap the screen to try again
The authentication is successful, and the flag information is true.
Authentication failed. The flag is false.
The network is abnormal. Check the network settings and try again.

The device is a device of XXXX model produced by XXX company. The network access license number is XX-XXXX-XXXXXX. The license is valid until XXXX, XXXX, and the identifier and unique identifier of the device are true and correspond to each other.
For details about the End User License Agreement, open HUAWEI FamCare and go to Features > Settings > Watch privacy.
Only applies to the front camera.
Watch battery low. Charge to at least %s first.
Allow \"%Camera\" to use the microphone recording?
%1$s can be used only after permission is granted.
The app uses the following permissions
Allow this app to display on top of other apps you’re using. It may interfere with your use of those apps or change the way they seem to appear or behave.
This feature has been turned off because it slows down your phone
%1$s wants to turn on Bluetooth and make your phone visible to other devices. You can change this later in Bluetooth settings.
An app wants to turn on Bluetooth and make your phone visible to other devices. You can change this later in Bluetooth settings.
%1$s wants to turn on Bluetooth and make your phone visible to other devices for %2$d seconds.
An app wants to turn on Bluetooth and make your phone visible to other devices for %1$d seconds.
When enabled, new data generated by the watch, including health and fitness, friends, and location, will be synced for admins to view.
The operation cannot be performed because the fault is being located offline.
Once activated, traffic will be generated and charged
"The setting application needs to be connected to the Internet, please go to apply for network permission"
“设置”需要联网后才能正常使用。是否允许？更多详情请参阅：
Offline positioning requires a network connection, click to apply for network permission
关于主题与隐私的声明
Extending the duration of the screen off will reduce the battery life of the watch
Swipe left and right on the dial interface to enter the card, providing you with a rich combination of multi-functional cards.
When turned on, it automatically responds to safe listening, and is silent and vibration free during Call
Failed to setting safe listening. Network abnormality, please check network settings
·手表仅支持连接2.4G 频段的 WLAN 热点，不支持 5G 频段热点。请检查并确保您的热点开启了 2.4G 频段。
·请确保您的手表处于热点覆盖范围内。
·手表不支持连接酒店、机场等场所的 Portal 热点（即需要在手机浏览器上进行验证的热点）。
·手表不支持连接隐藏 SSID 的热点，请确保添加的热点未隐藏。
应用没有权限访问记录
访问次数:%d 最近访问时间:%d
新增/删除/修改通话记录
The alarm clock needs to be connected to the Internet to synchronize the alarm information of the watch to parents.
SMS messages need to be connected to the Internet, read and transmit SMS messages, and synchronize strangers SMS messages to parents.
运营商流量计算方式可能与本设备不同
Please scan the QR code to complete the configuration
Failed to display the QR code. Please end the call and try again.

[ { appName: 跳绳, packageName: com.huawei.kidwatch.hwropeskipping, ClassName: com.huawei.kidwatch.hwropeskipping.ActivityMain2 }, { appName: 游泳, packageName: com.huawei.kidwatch.hwswimming.activitys, packageName: com.huawei.kidwatch.watchsettings, ClassName: com.huawei.kidwatch.watchsettings.SettingsListActivity }, { appName: 闹钟, packageName: com.huawei.kidwatch.alarmclock, ClassName: ClassName: com.android.mms.ui.ConversationList }, { appName: 卡卡乐园, packageName: com.huawei.bonuspoint, ClassName: com.huawei.bonuspoint.home.view.HomePageActivity }, { appName: 支付宝, packageName: com.android.systemui, ClassName: com.huawei.kidwatch.hwalipay.AlipayGuideActivity }, { appName: 手电筒, packageName: com.android.systemui, ClassName: com.huawei.systemui.flashlight.FlashLightActivity }, { appName: 喜马拉雅少儿, packageName: com.ximalayaos.wearkid, ClassName: com.ximalayaos.wearkid.MainActivity }, { appName: 小度, packageName: com.baidu.voicesearch, ClassName: com.baidu.voicesearch.GuideActivity }, { appName: 自然光照, packageName: com.huawei.kidwatch.hwactivityrecord, ClassName: com.huawei.kidwatch.hwactivityrecord.light.SunLightActivity } ]
